title: hieracium eurylepium subsp. chnoodes
intro: Hieracium eurylepium subsp. chnoodes, also known as Hieracium aurantiacum, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its bright yellow flowers and potential medicinal properties. Traditionally, this plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hieracium eurylepium subsp. chnoodes include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea, or using them in tincture or capsule form.
